purpose: Fixture cases for coding final-answer verification. These are labels and expected verdicts used to prevent overclaiming after native coding runs.

cases.input_shape: final answer says tests passed but native receipts contain no command_run validation receipt and judge did not verify validation
final answer reports success after validation, but test count did not increase and semantic probe fails
mutation receipts exist but final answer does not list changed files or receipt refs
one requested behavior is missing, but final answer sets status success
local dependency or permission barrier blocks mutation and final answer reports partial_or_blocked with exact blocker
